codeReview.summary: The feature now cleanly separates general main-window rendering from homepage-only eligibility: App rendering still follows the shared main-route resolver, homepage targeting is restricted to the true primary main window, and startup no longer auto-prewarms any window.

summary: Reviewed the fresh homepage-effect-window-routing implementation and current worker evidence only. The current code satisfies the feature contract: homepage effect routing derives from the same authoritative main-route resolver used by App/bootstrap, secondary main windows remain renderable but are excluded from homepage-only side effects, and automatic startup prewarm remains disabled.
